quotes.quote: The Ideator generates candidate approaches based on the PI brief, scores them on novelty and feasibility, and distributes the top-ranked proposals across parallel branches of the Parallel Explore-Exploit (PEE) orchestrator.
quotes.rationale: Ideation-stage scoring on novelty and feasibility that ranks proposals and controls which are distributed to branches; no prior-art corpus or reliability study reported for this channel.

quotes.quote: Each branch runs an isolated cycle: a Solver agent iterates up to E evaluated versions per node, with a task-specific evaluator scoring each submission. At each iteration, the top-K branches are retained, and the remaining slots are filled with new branches derived from these top performers via fresh ideation.
quotes.rationale: Task-specific evaluator scores drive branch retention and expansion, i.e. implemented closed-loop search control over the discovery process.

quotes.quote: Runs that crashed due to infrastructure issues (API timeouts, rate limits, LaTeX compilation errors) were re-attempted with fresh state, up to 3 attempts per run. No run was re-attempted to improve solver scores.
quotes.rationale: Constrains the run protocol around solver scoring: retries were limited to infrastructure failures and not used to inflate evaluator scores.

quotes.quote: A refinement pass then consumes the verifier’s findings: an LLM rewrites flagged sentences to match their evidence sources, removes claims that cannot be supported, and strips all inline evidence annotations from the final LATEX. Only a draft with no remaining blocking violations is promoted to the final paper.
quotes.rationale: Verifier findings are routed into candidate revision and act as a blocking gate on promotion to the final paper.

quotes.quote: CoE Integrity Audit addresses some of these blind spots but is itself limited to structural integrity, not scientific novelty or significance.
quotes.rationale: The audit's target is explicitly structural integrity and explicitly excludes novelty and significance; its routing is not described in the excerpts.

quotes.quote: All I1–I3 flagged results were manually verified by human reviewers. I4 judgments were validated on a sampled basis.
quotes.rationale: Human reviewers check the automated audit's flagged outputs, a check on the evaluator itself; the outcome of the agreement check is not stated in the excerpts and no routing back into the pipeline is described.

quotes.quote: No third-party system was designed for ADRS, and adaptation inevitably involves judgment calls.
quotes.rationale: Comparison baselines are externally sourced but adapted by the authors' judgment, so the comparison is not independently constituted for this task.

policy_type: Parallel Explore-Exploit (PEE) orchestration with top-K branch retention and refill via fresh ideation
Ideator novelty/feasibility scoring for proposal ranking and distribution
Bounded per-node iteration (up to E evaluated versions)
Blocking-violation gate on promotion to final paper
Infrastructure-failure retry policy capped at 3 attempts per run
memory_structure: Within-run branch state: top-K retained branches plus branches derived from top performers
Per-node evaluated version history (up to E versions)
Retries executed with fresh state (no state carryover across attempts)

diagnostics.statement: The Ideator's novelty score is produced from the PI brief with no reported prior-art corpus or literature retrieval, yet it ranks and routes proposals into the parallel search.

exact_quotes.exact_quote: The Ideator generates candidate approaches based on the PI brief, scores them on novelty and feasibility, and distributes the top-ranked proposals across parallel branches of the Parallel Explore-Exploit (PEE) orchestrator.

diagnostics.consequence: Novelty ranking that steers the entire search may reflect model priors rather than actual prior art, so unoriginal directions can be promoted and original ones discarded without detection.

diagnostics.statement: The integrity audit is explicitly limited to structural integrity and excludes scientific novelty and significance, so no reported channel adjudicates those properties on finished outputs.

exact_quotes.exact_quote: CoE Integrity Audit addresses some of these blind spots but is itself limited to structural integrity, not scientific novelty or significance.

diagnostics.consequence: Structurally clean but scientifically trivial or duplicative papers can pass every reported gate.

diagnostics.statement: The claim verifier both diagnoses unsupported claims and gates promotion, and no reliability study of its flagging accuracy is reported.

exact_quotes.exact_quote: A refinement pass then consumes the verifier’s findings: an LLM rewrites flagged sentences to match their evidence sources, removes claims that cannot be supported, and strips all inline evidence annotations from the final LATEX. Only a draft with no remaining blocking violations is promoted to the final paper.

diagnostics.consequence: Verifier false negatives pass unsupported claims into the final paper, and the gate can be cleared by rewriting text rather than by strengthening evidential support.

diagnostics.statement: Human verification is complete for I1–I3 flags but only sampled for I4, and no agreement rate or disagreement outcome is stated.

exact_quotes.exact_quote: All I1–I3 flagged results were manually verified by human reviewers. I4 judgments were validated on a sampled basis.

diagnostics.consequence: The audit's error rate on I4 and on unflagged material is unquantified, so reported integrity figures cannot be bounded.

diagnostics.statement: Comparison baselines were not designed for the task and were adapted through unspecified author judgment calls.

exact_quotes.exact_quote: No third-party system was designed for ADRS, and adaptation inevitably involves judgment calls.

diagnostics.consequence: Comparative performance claims are confounded by author-controlled adaptation choices and are not independently reproducible as stated.

diagnostics.statement: The pipeline's scope excludes core activities of the research genre it targets.

exact_quotes.exact_quote: Real systems papers involve problem formulation, workload characterization, multi-dataset analysis, and deployment tradeoffs that our pipeline does not attempt.

diagnostics.consequence: Capability claims may be read as covering a broader research scope than the validated pipeline actually spans.

exact_quotes.exact_quote: The Ideator generates candidate approaches based on the PI brief, scores them on novelty and feasibility, and distributes the top-ranked proposals across parallel branches of the Parallel Explore-Exploit (PEE) orchestrator.
CoE Integrity Audit addresses some of these blind spots but is itself limited to structural integrity, not scientific novelty or significance.

success_check.observable: Share of ranked proposals whose novelty score is grounded in retrieved prior-art documents, and the rate of near-duplicate proposals surviving ranking.
success_check.comparator_or_threshold: Retrieval-grounded novelty scoring on 100% of ranked proposals, with duplicate survival rate below the current brief-only scorer on a held-out set of known-published ideas.
success_check.evidence_needed: Per-proposal retrieval logs plus a labelled benchmark of published versus novel ideas with detection rates per condition.

exact_quotes.exact_quote: A refinement pass then consumes the verifier’s findings: an LLM rewrites flagged sentences to match their evidence sources, removes claims that cannot be supported, and strips all inline evidence annotations from the final LATEX. Only a draft with no remaining blocking violations is promoted to the final paper.
All I1–I3 flagged results were manually verified by human reviewers. I4 judgments were validated on a sampled basis.

success_check.observable: Verifier false-negative and false-positive rates against blind human adjudication of a random sample of unflagged sentences as well as flagged ones.
success_check.comparator_or_threshold: Per-class error rates with confidence intervals reported for flagged, unflagged, and I4 strata.
success_check.evidence_needed: A stratified audit protocol with sample sizes, blinding procedure, and a confusion matrix against human labels.

exact_quotes.exact_quote: No third-party system was designed for ADRS, and adaptation inevitably involves judgment calls.

success_check.observable: Baseline adaptation decisions made or reviewed by parties not authoring the proposed system.
success_check.comparator_or_threshold: Comparative results reproduced within a stated tolerance under an externally specified adaptation protocol.
success_check.evidence_needed: Published adaptation configurations, the identity and independence of the adapting party, and re-run comparison metrics.

exact_quotes.exact_quote: Real systems papers involve problem formulation, workload characterization, multi-dataset analysis, and deployment tradeoffs that our pipeline does not attempt.

success_check.observable: An explicit in-scope/out-of-scope statement attached to each capability and performance claim.
success_check.comparator_or_threshold: Every headline claim carries the enumerated excluded activities alongside it.
success_check.evidence_needed: Claim-by-claim scope annotation in the reported artifact.

exact_quotes.exact_quote: CoE Integrity Audit addresses some of these blind spots but is itself limited to structural integrity, not scientific novelty or significance.

A refinement pass then consumes the verifier’s findings: an LLM rewrites flagged sentences to match their evidence sources, removes claims that cannot be supported, and strips all inline evidence annotations from the final LATEX. Only a draft with no remaining blocking violations is promoted to the final paper.

success_check.observable: Recorded human sign-off before any draft is promoted to a final paper, covering the novelty and significance dimensions the audit excludes.
success_check.comparator_or_threshold: 100% of promoted drafts carry a logged human approval or escalation decision.
success_check.evidence_needed: Promotion logs linking each final paper to an identified human approver and their recorded judgment.
